Quality_Control_Metric: Verify monoterpene purity matrix > 98.5% via Gas Chromatography
Moisture-controlled lipophilic barrier sealing to prevent premature volatilization
Maintain storage temperatures between 15°C and 25°C; avoid high thermal degradation
Customs clearance using institutional humanitarian/research waivers
Documentation_Requirement: Commercial Invoice / IRB Protocol Approval Letter

Quality_Control_Metric: Log bottle unique serial identifiers into pharmacy dispense matrices
Match dispensed counts against signed Patient Informed Consent Forms (ICFs)
